zh.lifeSummary: 當Kunigunde von Isenburg於大約1125年出生時，她的父親Rembold von Isenburg51歲，母親Katharina von Arnstein47歲。她和Eberhard I. von Sayn至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1178年之後。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Isenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German or Jewish   Eisenberg  .
German: habitational name from the name of a medieval castle in the southern part of Hesse, the origin of a long line of nobility from the 12th century into the 21st century.

variants.name: Eisenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Moshe, Isadore, Akiva, Aron, Avner, Chaim, Emanuel, Isidor.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named, from Middle High German īsen ‘iron’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

en.lifeSummary: When Kunigunde von Isenburg was born about 1125, her father, Rembold von Isenburg, was 51 and her mother, Katharina von Arnstein, was 47. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Eberhard I. von Sayn. She died after 1178.

ja.lifeSummary: Kunigunde von Isenburgが約1125年に生まれた時，父Rembold von Isenburgは51歳，母Katharina von Arnsteinは47歳であった。彼女はEberhard I. von Saynとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1178年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kunigunde von Isenburg(이)가 대략 1125년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rembold von Isenburg(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharina von Arnstein(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 Eberhard I. von Sayn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 이후 사망했다.
